<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Planning Unit List For Specified ProgramId and TracerCategoryIds"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/program/{programId}/tracerCategory/planningUnit"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get the Planning unit list for specified programId and tracerCategoryIds

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"programId","in":"path","description":"programId that you want to get Planning unit list for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},{"name":"tracerCategoryIds","description":"Array of tracerCategoryIds that you want to get Planning unit list for"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Array of tracerCategoryIds that you want to get Planning unit list for","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the Planning unit list","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"404":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND if the some of the underlying data does not match.","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of Planning unit list","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
